summary.business_type: Local Service — Driving School (Service Area Business / hybrid, Greater Victoria & Langford, BC)
summary.data_sources: Deployed static build (public_html) + React source + live HTTP checks. No Google/PageSpeed/CrUX/GSC/GA4, Moz, Bing, or DataForSEO credentials available — performance is lab/asset-based and local/GBP conclusions are inferred, not API-verified.
top_findings: Soft-404: any unknown URL returns HTTP 200 serving the homepage (verified) — index-bloat and duplicate-content risk.
Client-rendered SPA: non-JS crawlers (incl. all AI bots) see only ~17% of content (~205 words) and a ~90%-duplicate boilerplate fallback repeated across all 38 pages.
NAP conflict: the Google Maps embed on the homepage and Contact page shows 'Victoria, BC V9B 4G2' while schema/footer/llms.txt say 'Langford, BC V9B 4G1'.
Reputation gap: zero verifiable reviews, no aggregateRating, and 8 hardcoded/unattributable 5-star testimonials (one from 'Nanaimo', outside the service area).
Competitor image hotlinked: /road-test-prep/ uses easydriversed.com as its og:image, twitter:image, and course thumbnail.
quick_wins: Add ErrorDocument 404 + a real 404 route so unknown URLs stop returning 200 homepage.
Correct the Google Maps embed to the canonical Langford V9B 4G1 address (or reconcile in GBP first).
Replace the competitor-hotlinked easydriversed.com image with an owned asset (courseCatalog.ts / seoLandingPages.ts).
Add a security-headers block (HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy) to .htaccess.
Add the 2 orphan course pages to sitemap.xml and regenerate lastmod from real build dates.
Add alt text to the 24 of 28 images that lack it; make the footer phone a real tel: link.
Emit BlogPosting, Course, and hasOfferCatalog JSON-LD (the underlying data already exists).
Delete the unused course-pictures/ folder (~10 MB) and the inert Netlify _redirects file.

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: robots.txt cleanly allows all major search + AI crawlers and declares the sitemap.
Canonical, unique titles/meta, and robots:index,follow are correct in raw HTML on every page.
HTTPS and non-www→www redirects resolve to the canonical host; clean lowercase/hyphenated URLs.
LocalBusiness/DrivingSchool JSON-LD is present in raw HTML (not JS-gated).

findings.title: Soft-404 serves homepage as HTTP 200 for any unknown URL
findings.description: curl to a made-up URL returns 200 with Content-Length 8550 identical to the homepage (same <title>/<h1>). Broken, removed, or mistyped URLs become indexable duplicate-homepage pages; also masks missing files (indexnow.txt, rsl.xml return fake 200s).
findings.recommendation: Add ErrorDocument 404 in .htaccess and a real 404 template; have the SPA emit a true 404/noindex for unknown routes.

findings.title: Near-duplicate boilerplate in raw HTML across all 38 pages
findings.description: The 6 <h2> sections of the #seo-fallback stub are word-for-word identical on home, course, service, and blog pages — only the H1 + one intro sentence differ. Non-JS crawlers get near-duplicate documents that lose page-specific facts.
findings.recommendation: Prerender genuinely unique per-route content into the static HTML (real page copy, not shared homepage sections).

findings.title: Content is client-rendered — critical facts absent from raw HTML
findings.description: Rendered homepage ≈1,213 words vs ≈205 words in raw HTML (~17% reaches non-JS agents). Unique data (e.g. '10 x 90 min classes') exists only post-render; an 850–871 KB entry JS chunk (263 KB gzip) loads on all 38 pages before any content appears.
findings.recommendation: Move to true SSR/SSG (or full-fidelity prerender) so the initial HTML contains the real per-page content.

findings.title: Missing security/best-practice headers
findings.description: Only 'Content-Security-Policy: upgrade-insecure-requests' is sent. Strict-Transport-Security, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, and Permissions-Policy are absent (verified live).
findings.recommendation: Add a mod_headers block in .htaccess with HSTS + the four missing headers.

findings.title: Sitemap lastmod is stale/uniform; 2 orphan pages missing
findings.description: All 36 sitemap URLs share lastmod=2026-05-24 while the live Last-Modified is 2026-06-30. /courses/lesson-road-test-prep-course/ and /courses/make-your-own-class/ are live (200) but absent from the sitemap and from static internal links.
findings.recommendation: Generate lastmod from real build/file timestamps; add the 2 orphan URLs to the sitemap and link them from the courses/packages index.

findings.title: http+non-www takes 2 redirect hops; IndexNow faux-present; stray _redirects
findings.description: http://drivingschoolbc.ca/ redirects http→https(non-www)→https(www). /indexnow.txt returns 200 only because of the soft-404. An inert Netlify-syntax _redirects file ships in public_html.
findings.recommendation: Set Hostinger forwarding to go straight to https+www; implement a real IndexNow key; delete _redirects.

categories.name: Content Quality & E-E-A-T
what_works: Clear entity definition via LocalBusiness/DrivingSchool + FAQPage schema; plain-English, audience-appropriate prose.
Real contact infrastructure (phone, email, physical address, contact form, policy pages).
No factual inaccuracies in the ICBC/BC driving guidance itself; llms.txt reinforces the entity.

findings.title: ~90% duplicate crawl-time content across all URLs
findings.description: The static fallback body is ~220 words with the same 6 homepage sections on every page; only H1/intro are unique. To non-JS crawlers every page reads as near-duplicate.
findings.recommendation: Prerender unique per-route content — the single highest-leverage content fix.

findings.title: Thin blog posts, no depth
findings.description: Blog posts run ~230–330 words (src/data/blogPosts.tsx) vs a ~1,500-word competitive floor, with little BC-specific depth.
findings.recommendation: Expand to genuinely useful, locally-specific guides with examples, routes, and sourced stats.

findings.title: No named/credentialed instructors (weak Experience/Expertise)
findings.description: About page has no team roster or credentials; the only names live in dead code (TeamSection.tsx) that are leftover web-agency template roles ('CEO & Founder', 'Lead Developer').
findings.recommendation: Add real instructor bios, ICBC-relevant credentials, photos, and blog author bylines. Delete the template TeamSection before it ships fake bios.

findings.title: Unverifiable testimonials & safety claims
findings.description: 8 hardcoded 5-star quotes with no source/date (one from 'Nanaimo', outside the service area). Trust chips ('Licensed Instructors', 'Insured & Licensed') are unsupported labels.
findings.recommendation: Source real, attributable reviews; support trust claims with specifics (licence/insurance detail, ICBC alignment).

findings.title: Freshness signals not machine-readable
findings.description: Blog dates render as plain text ('March 1, 2026'); no BlogPosting schema, no ISO datePublished/author.
findings.recommendation: Emit BlogPosting JSON-LD with ISO dates and author (data already exists).

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Unique, intent- and location-matched title tags on all 38 pages.
Unique meta descriptions on all 38 pages (76–154 chars).
Exactly one H1 per page; self-referencing canonical on every page; index,follow everywhere.
Complete hreflang (en-ca + x-default) and full OpenGraph/Twitter tags.

findings.title: Two pages orphaned from sitemap and internal links
findings.description: /courses/lesson-road-test-prep-course/ and /courses/make-your-own-class/ are live but not in the sitemap or static nav.
findings.recommendation: Add to sitemap and link from the courses index (or noindex if intentional).

findings.title: Internal link graph depends on JS render
findings.description: The static fallback exposes ~7 nav links; the full header/footer/related mesh is client-rendered, so non-JS crawlers see a shallow graph.
findings.recommendation: Include the primary nav + footer links in the prerendered HTML.

findings.title: Title/keyword mismatch + a few short descriptions
findings.description: /courses/seniors-driving-course/ title is 'Enhanced Road Assessment' (splits intent from the slug); 4 meta descriptions are <90 chars.
findings.recommendation: Align the seniors title to the query and expand the short descriptions to ~120–155 chars.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Valid LocalBusiness+DrivingSchool JSON-LD on all 38 pages with a consistent @id, delivered in raw HTML (build-time + runtime).
FAQPage correctly implemented on 7 relevant pages; no deprecated types.
No fabricated AggregateRating/Review (correctly withheld — no verifiable review data exists).

findings.title: No Course schema on 14 course pages
findings.description: Real pricing/duration data (courseCatalog.ts, coursePricing.ts) is unused; /courses/* carry only the LocalBusiness block.
findings.recommendation: Loop courseCatalog in the postbuild generator to emit Course schema on all 14 pages (template provided in findings/schema.md §6.1).

findings.title: No Service schema on service pages
findings.description: /driving-lessons/, /defensive-driving/, /road-test-prep/, /road-test-vehicle/, /intensive-driving-course/, /knowledge-test-practice/ have zero Service markup.
findings.recommendation: Add Service JSON-LD per service page (template §6.2).

findings.title: No BreadcrumbList; no Organization/WebSite+SearchAction
findings.description: Only a visual breadcrumb on blog posts; the working /search?q= route is never exposed to Google.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList sitewide and Organization+WebSite with SearchAction (templates §6.3–6.4).

findings.title: No BlogPosting on 3 blog posts
findings.description: Real author/date/heroImage in blogPosts.tsx unused; dates non-ISO.
findings.recommendation: Emit BlogPosting with ISO dates (template §6.5).

findings.title: LocalBusiness missing geo, openingHoursSpecification, hasOfferCatalog
findings.description: Confirmed absent repo-wide; client vs build-time LocalBusiness objects have drifted (SeoManager has makesOffer the generator lacks).
findings.recommendation: Add hasOfferCatalog now (real data); add geo/hours once real values exist; sync the two schema sources.

categories.name: Performance (Core Web Vitals — lab/asset)
what_works: HTTP/2 + HTTP/3 advertised; gzip enabled; long immutable cache on images and hashed assets.
Route-level code-splitting (104 chunks) keeps non-home routes lighter.

findings.title: JS blocks first paint (client rendering)
findings.description: An 850 KB (263 KB gzip) entry chunk loads on all 38 pages and must parse/execute before content appears; initial HTML shows only a hidden ~220-word stub. LCP/TBT/INP risk on mobile.
findings.recommendation: Ship real content in HTML via SSR/SSG; split/defer the entry bundle; add preload for entry JS + hero.

findings.title: Very heavy, unoptimized images
findings.description: 28.9 MB of raster images: 1.19 MB hero PNG, a 1.5 MB PNG icon, ~0.5–0.7 MB course JPGs; only 1 WebP, 0 AVIF.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP/AVIF, compress, size to display, and serve srcset.

findings.title: Render-blocking CSS, no image dimensions, ~10 MB dead images
findings.description: 130 KB render-blocking CSS (no critical inlining); 0/28 images set width/height (CLS); the unused course-pictures/ folder (10.4 MB) ships without being referenced.
findings.recommendation: Inline critical CSS + purge unused; add width/height/aspect-ratio; delete the unused folder.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: robots.txt explicitly allows every major AI crawler (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, CCBot, Google-Extended, Applebot, etc.).
llms.txt is live, correctly linked, and comprehensive (NAP, key pages, services, AI summary).
Per-page title/meta/canonical + LocalBusiness/FAQPage JSON-LD present in raw HTML.

findings.title: Raw HTML ~80% thinner than the rendered page
findings.description: ~205 words reach non-JS AI crawlers vs ~1,213 rendered; 5/6 stub sections are byte-identical across pages, so AI agents effectively see one duplicated document.
findings.recommendation: Prerender/SSG all routes with real, unique content.

findings.title: Competitor image hotlinked as og:image
findings.description: /road-test-prep/ uses https://www.easydriversed.com/...jpg as og:image, twitter:image, and course thumbnail (from courseCatalog.ts:90 & seoLandingPages.ts:156) — promotes a competitor and risks breakage.
findings.recommendation: Replace with an owned, optimized image.

findings.title: FAQ answers only in JSON-LD; prices not surfaced as crawlable text
findings.description:
FAQ Q&As live in schema but not in visible

prose; pricing figures exist in the data model (e.g. fixedPrice 300) but are not reliably rendered as extractable text for citation.
findings.recommendation: Render visible Q&A HTML blocks and publish concrete price ranges as plain text.

findings.title: Thin brand/sameAs signals
findings.description: sameAs is only Facebook+Instagram (both branded 'Driving School BC', not the site name); no GBP, YouTube; Yelp listing exists but is unclaimed.
findings.recommendation: Add GBP + Yelp to sameAs, align social names, publish at least one YouTube video.

categories.name: Images
what_works: loading=lazy used on ~20 images; long immutable cache on all image types.
Branded OG social image with og:image:alt.

findings.title: Most images missing alt text
findings.description: Only 4 of 28 tags in src/ have alt (~86% missing).
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive, keyword-aware alt to every content image; alt="" for decorative.

findings.title: Huge legacy-format images + 1.5 MB icon
findings.description: 28.9 MB total; 34 JPG/14 PNG/1 WebP/0 AVIF; Misc/Installmenticon.png is 1.5 MB for an icon.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP/AVIF, compress, export at display size; replace the icon with SVG.

findings.title: No dimensions, poor filenames, dead-weight folder
findings.description: 0/28 images set width/height (CLS); filenames have spaces/caps/a typo ('Beiginners'); unused course-pictures/ (10.4 MB) ships.
findings.recommendation: Add dimensions; rename to lowercase-hyphenated slugs; remove the unused folder.

categories.name: Local SEO (conditional — critical for this business type)
what_works: LocalBusiness/DrivingSchool schema on every page with full NAP, areaServed (8 communities), sameAs, makesOffer.
Locally-flavored service pages; clickable tel:/mailto: on the Contact page; a live (unclaimed) Yelp listing exists.
llms.txt publishes a clean, internally-consistent NAP.

findings.title: NAP conflict: Maps embed vs canonical address
findings.description: The Google Maps embed on the homepage (Index.tsx:725) and Contact page (Contact.tsx:328) encodes 'Victoria, BC V9B 4G2' (a fixed Google Place ID), while schema/footer/contact copy/llms.txt use 'Langford, BC V9B 4G1'. Yelp independently shows 'Victoria'. Corrupts proximity ranking and NAP trust.
findings.recommendation: Confirm the correct address in the GBP dashboard, then make site, embed, Yelp, GBP, and socials match exactly.

findings.title: Reputation gap: zero reviews, no aggregateRating
findings.description: Yelp shows 0 reviews ('New on Yelp'); no aggregateRating anywhere; testimonials are hardcoded/unverifiable.
findings.recommendation: Claim GBP, launch a post-lesson review-request flow, and add aggregateRating only once real reviews exist.

findings.title: No business hours or geo published anywhere
findings.description: No openingHoursSpecification/geo in schema and no hours in visible HTML (matches COMPANY_KNOWLEDGE.md gap).
findings.recommendation: Publish real hours on Contact + add openingHoursSpecification and geo (lat/long).

findings.title: No dedicated location pages for 6 secondary communities
findings.description: Sidney, Sooke, Metchosin, Duncan, Colwood, Salt Spring Island get only a one-sentence card on Contact; pricing tiers already segment them.
findings.recommendation: Build unique [service]+[community] landing pages (the top local organic / #2 AI-visibility factor).

findings.title: Footer phone is vanity text; social names mismatch; service-area copy inconsistent
findings.description: Footer shows '250-LICENSE' with no tel: href; FB/IG surface as 'Driving School BC'; the static fallback lists Saanich+Oak Bay which are not in areaServed.
findings.recommendation: Add tel: href; align social names to the brand; reconcile the service-area list.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Fix the soft-404: add ErrorDocument 404 + real 404 route so unknown URLs return 404/noindex, not 200 homepage.
Resolve the NAP conflict: correct the Google Maps embed (homepage + Contact) to the canonical Langford V9B 4G1 address after confirming it in GBP; align Yelp/socials.
Replace the competitor-hotlinked easydriversed.com image (og/twitter/course) with an owned asset.
Add the security-headers block (HSTS + 4 missing headers) to .htaccess.

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Prerender/SSG genuinely unique per-route content into the static HTML (fixes duplicate fallback + CSR content gap for search and AI crawlers) — highest-leverage structural fix.
Emit Course (14 pages), Service (service pages), BlogPosting (3 posts), BreadcrumbList, Organization+WebSite/SearchAction, and hasOfferCatalog JSON-LD (data already exists).
Optimize images: convert to WebP/AVIF, compress the hero + 1.5 MB icon, add width/height, delete the unused 10 MB folder, add alt text to 24 images.
Add the 2 orphan pages to the sitemap; regenerate lastmod from real build dates; make the footer phone a tel: link.

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Add real, credentialed instructor bios/photos + blog author bylines; delete the template TeamSection.
Expand blog posts into in-depth, BC-specific guides; add visible FAQ Q&A prose and concrete published prices.
Claim GBP + Yelp, launch a review-acquisition flow, and add aggregateRating once real reviews exist.
Build dedicated [service]+[community] location pages for the 6 secondary service areas.

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Add a Google API key + verify Search Console to pull real CrUX/CWV, indexation, and query data for future audits.
Implement IndexNow properly; publish a YouTube video and align social profiles.
Re-audit after prerender to confirm raw-HTML content parity and re-score GEO (expected to jump into the 70s).
